inputs.text: A wide, still freshwater pond at the edge of a rural village, ancient and unhurried. The shallows are tawny-gold (#D4A437/#C8A951) and translucent, revealing smooth pebbles, decomposing leaves, and pond snail trails on the bottom, deepening to dark green-brown (#2F4F2F) at the mysterious center where the bottom vanishes. The surface reflects the sky — cerulean blue (#87CEEB) by day, bronze (#CD7F32) and copper-gold (#B87333) at golden hour, dark silver-blue (#4A6274) at dusk, and star-scattered dark water (#1C3A4F) at night. Jade-green (#3B7A57) waxy lotus pads float across the surface with mercury-like droplets, including a half-open lotus flower in pale pink (#FFB7C5) fading to cream. The western bank is sun-baked terracotta (#C75B39/#CD853F) clay, cracked in a fine mosaic, sloping gently to the waterline. The eastern bank is lined with wildflowers — yellow mustard (#E1AD01) and pale violet wood sorrel (#9B7ED8). Dragonflies in electric blue (#0077BE) and translucent green (#76D7C4) hover and dart above the surface. Water striders dimple the surface, sending concentric rings outward. At dusk, fireflies blink yellow-green (#ADFF2F) near the reeds. Rendered in Pixar-style 3D.
